failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Particulate matter or crystallization in the flow path
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement regular maintenance and filtration of feed solvent

failure_modes.cause: Excessive heat generation due to reaction kinetics
failure_modes.mitigation: Install temperature monitoring and control systems

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Conduct a blockage test by introducing particulate matter into the flow and observing BPR response
Perform a thermal stability test by running the reaction at elevated temperatures and monitoring for runaway conditions
